folder_purpose: Final user-facing launchers for EF audio and Windows workflow tools. Original tools remain in their source folders.

tools.name: Sound Finder for Reaper
tools.purpose: Search local SFX libraries, preview audio, recommend layer combinations, and drag files into Reaper.

tools.name: Unity/Wwise Log Monitor GUI
tools.purpose: Realtime Unity/Wwise audio log monitoring, issue screening, and analysis suggestions.

tools.name: AI Work Impact Summary - Week
tools.hidden_reason: Automatic or periodic report generator; keep out of the daily GUI.
tools.purpose: Generate weekly AI-assisted work impact summary.

tools.name: AI Work Impact Summary - Month
tools.hidden_reason: Automatic or periodic report generator; keep out of the daily GUI.
tools.purpose: Generate monthly AI-assisted work impact summary.

tools.name: Audio Report Trend - Once
tools.hidden_reason: Report aggregation tool; dashboard is the preferred visible entry.
tools.purpose: Aggregate recent audio reports and produce one trend summary.

tools.name: ProjectEF Audio Report Dashboard
tools.purpose: Open the local HTML report index.

tools.name: ProjectEF Daily Audio Log Intelligence
tools.hidden_reason: One-off report generator; hidden because the dashboard/log monitor are the daily visible entries.
tools.purpose: Analyze daily Unity/Wwise logs and reports into module, problem, runtime completion, and next-action summaries.

tools.name: ProjectEF Wwise Template Generator
tools.purpose: Create Wwise object structures from approved templates through WAAPI, with dry-run, naming replacement, Event retargeting, and validation.

tools.name: Audio Report Trend - Watch 3h
tools.hidden_reason: Background/watch report process; keep out of the manual GUI.
tools.purpose: Run the audio report trend monitor in watch mode for 3 hours.

tools.name: Runtime Audio Follow - Visible
tools.hidden_reason: Legacy runtime monitor; superseded by Unity/Wwise Log Monitor GUI.
tools.purpose: Start the legacy realtime Unity/Wwise runtime audio follow window.

tools.name: Runtime Audio Follow - Minimized
tools.hidden_reason: Legacy runtime monitor; superseded by Unity/Wwise Log Monitor GUI.
tools.purpose: Start the legacy realtime Unity/Wwise runtime audio follow minimized.

tools.name: Stop Runtime Audio Follow
tools.hidden_reason: Legacy helper for hidden runtime monitor processes.
tools.purpose: Stop legacy runtime audio follow processes.

tools.name: Register Audio Trend Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Register the periodic audio trend monitor scheduled task.

tools.name: Unregister Audio Trend Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Remove the periodic audio trend monitor scheduled task.

tools.name: Register Daily Log Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Register the daily log intelligence scheduled task.

tools.name: Unregister Daily Log Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Remove the daily log intelligence scheduled task.

tools.name: Wwise Profiler Voice Capture
tools.purpose: Capture active Wwise Profiler voices, Unity starvation/underrun log findings, and machine metrics during a targeted Play Mode reproduction; duration and interval are configurable in the GUI.

tools.name: P4V Audio Changelist Check
tools.hidden_reason: Read-only report entry; superseded in the GUI by P4V Changelist Organizer.
tools.purpose: Analyze the current ProjectEF P4V changelist or local fallback changes, filter audio-related files, and flag SoundBank backups, generated files, cache, and source-audio submit risks.

tools.name: P4V Changelist Organizer GUI
tools.purpose: GUI for filtering, labeling, learning, and locally reviewing ProjectEF audio-related pending files into P4 changelist groups. Supports task-goal memory, optional Ollama local AI review, selected-only moves, and creating one new pending changelist for selected rows; no revert/add/delete/submit.

tools.name: UI Audio Static Inspector GUI
tools.purpose: Read-only static report GUI scanner for ProjectEF UI audio coverage across Unity prefabs/scenes, ButtonEx/ToggleEx defaults, ButtonAudioComp presets, UIStateOnClickSoundController state audio, prefab instance audio overrides, and Wwise Event validity.

tools.name: Animation Wwise Event AutoConfig GUI
tools.purpose: Main GUI for audio-to-motion configuration. It configures Wwise Animation Events on Unity .fbx/.anim clips, and now includes a Round Info / Task Card intake for mixed animation, timeline, VFX, prefab, and UI requests. Task cards are read-only analysis records; actual writes still go through Preview/Apply. Supports batch text intake, OCR, multi-result preview selection, Wwise Event validation, Unity preview requests, reports, and receiver component setup without modifying WwiseAudioHelper.

tools.name: Audio Requirement Jira Triage GUI
tools.purpose: Read-only GUI for scanning ProjectEF design docs into versioned audio requirement evidence, matching Jira issues to exact design locations, judging whether audio work is needed or ready, and optionally using Ollama local AI for selected issue review. Does not modify Jira, Unity, Wwise, or P4.

tools.name: Audio Requirement Scan Diff - Once
tools.hidden_reason: Automation/periodic scan entry; the GUI is the preferred manual entry.
tools.purpose: Run one read-only design-doc scan, save a versioned snapshot, compare it with the previous index, and write audio requirement diff reports without opening the GUI. Does not modify Jira, Unity, Wwise, or P4.

tools.name: Register Audio Requirement Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Register a daily Windows scheduled task that runs the read-only audio requirement scan/diff once per day. Does not modify Jira, Unity, Wwise, P4, or source documents.

tools.name: Unregister Audio Requirement Scheduled Task
tools.purpose: Remove the daily ProjectEF audio requirement scan/diff scheduled task.

tools.name: AudioTools Git Sync GUI
tools.purpose: Mirror EdgeFlow/ProjectEF audio tool source + Sound Finder into the private Git repo, run a safety scan (excludes indexes, DBs, media, browser cookies, secrets), commit locally, and push to GitHub on explicit confirmation.

tools.name: Wwise Audio Logic Tester (LLM Sound Caster)
tools.purpose: Describe a complex Wwise playback test in natural language, save the raw description, generate a traceable DSL through local Ollama, API-backed OpenAI/Anthropic, or logged-in codex/claude CLI when available, then run WAAPI preflight plus playback steps with model/source labels and report output.

tools.name: ProjectEF Audio Debug Assistant
tools.purpose: Scenario-level Wwise and Unity/Wwise debug assistant. Type an Event, Wwise node, or issue description; it runs read-only Wwise local checks with WAAPI/Profiler and reuses the Unity/Wwise log monitor rules for game integration diagnosis.

tools.name: Daily Work Notes
tools.purpose: General Windows work manager for today's tasks, project-based completed pools, automatic date sync, unfinished-item rollover, search, priority, and Markdown/JSON export.

tools.name: Audio Identity Overlay Map Export
tools.purpose: Refresh the Unity Editor-only Resource Name Overlay identity map from P4 audio history learning, Unity audio footprint reports, and animation Wwise auto-config reports. It only writes the local overlay JSON map and does not modify Wwise, runtime audio loading, P4 changelists, or game prefabs.

tools.name: Tool Documentation Search GUI
tools.purpose: Generate Markdown documentation from the latest ProjectEF audio tool launchers and source code, search/view the generated docs in a GUI, and optionally explain search results through local Ollama or remote OpenAI-compatible models.

tools.name: Audio Codex Task Card Generator
tools.hidden_reason: Internal analysis module now integrated into Animation Wwise Event AutoConfig GUI.
tools.purpose: Read-only GUI for collecting animation, timeline, VFX, prefab, and UI audio configuration requests into a structured Codex task card. It scans candidate Unity assets and references, summarizes likely configuration owners, and writes Markdown/JSON cards without modifying Unity, Wwise, P4, or project runtime audio logic.

tools.name: Screenshot To Excel
tools.purpose: Run-test screenshot evidence capture tool. It watches clipboard screenshots, Win+PrintScreen folders, and Xbox Game Bar captures, then writes a timestamped Excel report with original image paths, thumbnails, capture time, source, size, and a notes column.

tools.name: Audio Jira Creator GUI
tools.purpose: Create PROEF audio Jira issues from a title + involved disciplines. Template-filled description, disciplines->components mapping, full preview, POST only after explicit confirm. Reuses Jira Triage cookie; Learn button pulls valid types/components from createmeta. Jira is internal (needs Mullvad off).

tools.name: Tool Inventory HTML
tools.purpose: Open a local refreshable HTML inventory that maps ProjectEF audio tools to launchers, scripts, helper files, Unity/P4 candidates, and submit rules such as local-only tool, Unity Editor tool, runtime script that must ship with prefab/object, or review-only generated data.

tools.name: REAPER Project Manager
tools.purpose: Local GUI for scanning and managing REAPER .rpp projects. Shows all projects under a chosen root, sorts by modified/created date, name, size, or match count, filters by filename/path keywords, optionally searches inside .rpp text, and can open projects, reveal folders, copy paths, or export CSV.

tools.name: Audio AutoCapture + Briefing
tools.purpose: Background daemon auto-captures ProjectEF audio runtime logs per game session (starts when the game/Unity log goes active), then rolls sessions into daily/weekly briefings of problems + suggested fixes. Control menu: start daemon, run daily/weekly briefing now, register auto-start + scheduled tasks, open reports.
